resources.name: Big-O Cheat Sheet
resources.desc: Time & space complexity for common algorithms and data structures.

discussions.author: alice
discussions.text: Great reference! Always forget space complexity for merge sort.

interviewQuestions: What is the time complexity of binary search?
Explain amortized complexity with an example.
